name: BibleProject Brand Fonts
description: Self-hosted WOFF2 font files from BibleProject's brand system. Includes all weights and styles for both display and body typefaces.
attribution: Fonts are provided for use in projects that represent or reference BibleProject. Please review the BibleProject brand guidelines before use.

name: BibleProject Logo Pack
description: SVG and PNG versions of the BibleProject logo in both blue-on-white and white-on-dark variants, with clear space guidelines.
attribution: Logo usage is subject to BibleProject's brand guidelines. Do not alter, outline, or place content on top of the logo.
